title: Give Us This Night
writer: Jacques Bachrach, Edwin Justus Mayer, Frank Partos
actors: Jan Kiepura, Gladys Swarthout, Philip Merivale
plot: Antonio, a singing Neapolitan fisherman who loves opera, is in trouble after throwing some eggs at a bad tenor. Trying to elude the carabinieri he hides in church and finds himself singing with Maria, a soprano in need of a tenor.
